title: Mitarbeiter im Project Management Office (PMO) (m/w/d)
required_skills: Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse C1 oder höher
matched_skills: Business Administration background (BWL-equivalent experience, HSBC PMO, ECE Business Development)
Microsoft Office — Excel (listed in tools; Power BI certified)
Strukturierte Arbeitsweise — evidenced across PMO, agile delivery, and reporting roles
IT-Umfeld Kenntnisse — Hapag-Lloyd tech project coordination, IoT/IT sector experience (bonus)
missing_skills: German C1 — candidate is B1; role is at a German-language Systemhaus and explicitly requires C1 or higher (hard gap)
Recruitment / staff search and pre-screening — no direct experience sourcing or pre-screening staff for client projects
Mitarbeiterprofile Pflege — no direct experience managing employee profile databases
Skill-Datenbank Management — no explicit experience maintaining skill/competency databases
core_responsibilities: Eigenständige Suche und Vorauswahl von Mitarbeitenden für Kundenprojekte
Management der Skill-Datenbank und Sicherstellung deren Aktualität
Proaktive Kommunikation als Schnittstelle mit Consultants, Vertrieb und Führungskräften
Weiterentwicklung des PMO regional und überregional
recommended_emphasis: PMO Operations at HSBC — budget tracking, cross-functional coordination, and programme governance directly maps to PMO support role
Cross-functional stakeholder interface experience (Product, Engineering, C-suite, Consultants) — mirrors Schnittstelle requirement
Excel and data reporting skills (Power BI, dashboards, burn-rate reports) — demonstrates structured data management capability
Agile delivery coordination at Hapag-Lloyd — sprint ceremonies, documentation, and reporting relevant to PMO support context
IT-Umfeld exposure across Hapag-Lloyd and IoT/IT sector roles — addresses the wünschenswert IT knowledge criterion

company_info.size_raw: eines der führenden Systemhäuser in Deutschland

_score_notes: Raw skill/responsibility match ~78% before language penalty. German C1 is a hard stated requirement; candidate's B1 is a significant gap for a German-language Systemhaus role with daily communication duties. Hard gap penalty applied (-26 points). Part-time 20h/week is a structural note but does not affect skill scoring.
